mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COM_SYS_ERR_MSG ( CO_ID, MSG_ID, ERR_MSG, ENDPOINT, RQST_PARA, MDL_NM, CRE_USR_ID, CRE_DT ) VALUES ( #{coId}, (SELECT get_mdl_seq2(#{coId}, 'ERR', 6)), #{errMsg}, #{endpoint}, #{rqstPara, typeHandler=com.clt.hrm.infra.common.typehandler.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{mdlNm}, #{creUsrId}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO COM_SYS_ERR_MSG ( CO_ID, MSG_ID, ERR_MSG, ENDPOINT, RQST_PARA, MDL_NM, CRE_USR_ID, CRE_DT ) VALUES
( #{item.coId}, (SELECT get_mdl_seq2(#{item.coId}, 'ERR', 6)), #{item.errMsg}, #{item.endpoint}, #{item.rqstPara, typeHandler=com.clt.hrm.infra.common.typehandler.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{item.mdlNm}, #{item.creUsrId}, #{item.creDt}::timestamptz )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM COM_SYS_ERR_MSG WHERE CO_ID = #{coId} AND CRE_DT >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - INTERVAL '3 months' AND CRE_DT < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)
